title: Used To / Would — Past Habits
description: USED TO and WOULD describe past habits that don't happen anymore.
summary_pt_br: USED TO = hábito passado que não existe mais. WOULD = ação repetida no passado. Para estado, só USED TO.

scenes.subtitle_en: USED TO and WOULD describe past habits that don't happen anymore.
scenes.subtitle_pt: USED TO = hábito passado que não existe mais. WOULD = ação repetida no passado. Para estado, só USED TO.

scenes.text_en: USED TO and WOULD describe past habits that don't happen anymore. Today's focus: used to / would — past habits. I used to live in a small town by the sea.
scenes.text_pt: USED TO = hábito passado que não existe mais. WOULD = ação repetida no passado. Para estado, só USED TO. Foco de hoje: used to / would — past habits. Eu morava numa cidadezinha à beira-mar.

scenes.title: Used To / Would — Past Habits
scenes.body_en: USED TO + base verb = past habit or state no longer true. WOULD + base verb = past habitual action (not for states — say USED TO BE, not WOULD BE). 'I used to live in Rio. Every Sunday we would walk on the beach.'
scenes.body_pt: USED TO = hábito passado que não existe mais. WOULD = ação repetida no passado. Para estado, só USED TO.

examples.en: I used to live in a small town by the sea.
examples.pt: Eu morava numa cidadezinha à beira-mar.

examples.en: We would go dancing every Saturday night.
examples.pt: A gente ia dançar todo sábado à noite.

examples.en: She used to love classical music when she was young.
examples.pt: Ela adorava música clássica quando era jovem.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Used To / Would — Past Habits

exercise.question: Complete: "I used to live in a ___ town by the sea."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I used to live in a small town by the sea."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Eu morava numa cidadezinha à beira-mar.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
We would go dancing every Saturday night.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "We would go dancing every Saturday night."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A gente ia dançar todo sábado à noite.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Used To / Would — Past Habits — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre used to / would — past habits. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Tell me about your life when you were twenty years old.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I used to live in a small town in the mountains.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: That sounds lovely. What would you do on weekends?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We would walk to the river and swim all afternoon.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Did you use to have many friends back then?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I used to know everyone in town by name.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What kind of music did you use to listen to?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I would dance to samba every Saturday night.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Do you still visit that town sometimes?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I used to go every summer, but not anymore.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Memories like those keep us alive. Thank you for sharing.

scenes.title: Dona Lúcia's childhood
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write what Dona Lúcia used to do as a young woman. Include at least two USED TO and one WOULD.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On the porch of her small house, Dona Lúcia sat with her grandchildren and opened the door to the past.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: When I was your age, we used to live in a village with no electricity at all.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: Really, grandma? What would you do at night without any lights?

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Every evening we would gather around the radio to listen to stories and news.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: I used to read until my eyes hurt, by the weak light of a single lamp.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: The children listened silently, imagining a world their phones would never show them.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Used To / Would — Past Habits". USED TO and WOULD describe past habits that don't happen anymore. I used to live in a small town by the sea. We would go dancing every Saturday night. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Used To / Would — Past Habits". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.explanation: She says: "Used To / Would — Past Habits".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Used To / Would — Past Habits".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
